# Dev-SSO Developer Docs - LLM Index

Machine-readable index for the Indonesian and English documentation.

## Base URL
https://docs.sso.timeh.my.id

## Bahasa Indonesia

- / - Overview and quick start
- /onboarding - Client web application onboarding
- /integrations/laravel - Laravel confidential client integration
- /integrations/nextjs - Recommended Next.js confidential BFF integration
- /integrations/vuejs - Vue.js public SPA integration
- /integrations/express - Express confidential client integration
- /api-reference - OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect endpoint reference
- /scopes-and-claims - Scope and token claim catalog
- /errors - Error reference and troubleshooting
- /security-model - PKCE, token, and client security policy
- /resource-server - Access token validation guide

## English

- /en/ - Overview and quick start
- /en/onboarding - Client web application onboarding
- /en/integrations/laravel - Laravel confidential client integration
- /en/integrations/nextjs - Recommended Next.js confidential BFF integration
- /en/integrations/vuejs - Vue.js public SPA integration
- /en/integrations/express - Express confidential client integration
- /en/api-reference - OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect endpoint reference
- /en/scopes-and-claims - Scope and token claim catalog
- /en/errors - Error reference and troubleshooting
- /en/security-model - PKCE, token, and client security policy
- /en/resource-server - Access token validation guide

## Key Information

- Issuer: https://api-sso.timeh.my.id
- Discovery: https://api-sso.timeh.my.id/.well-known/openid-configuration
- JWKS: https://api-sso.timeh.my.id/.well-known/jwks.json
- PKCE S256 is mandatory for every client
- Confidential clients authenticate at token, refresh, and revocation endpoints
- ES256 signing algorithm for JWTs
- Access token audience: sso-resource-api
